title: AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THIRTY-NINE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SIX.

chunks.text:
S. No. 270 / 48 OG No. 5, 1690 (May, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 681, May 09, 1952 ]

AN ACT TO AMEND SECTION THIRTY-NINE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED ONE HUNDRED AND SIXTY-SIX.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 9, 1952.
